mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlists WHERE userId = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO playlists (userId, name, profile, type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, '', 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlists WHERE userId = #{userId} AND name != '已点赞的歌曲'

SELECT p.id, p.userId, p.name, p.coverUrl, p.coverNetworkUrl, p.type, p.is_private AS isPrivate, u.nickName AS authorName FROM playlists p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.userId = u.id WHERE p.userId = #{userId} AND p.is_private = 0 AND p.name != '已点赞的歌曲' ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC
